zh.lifeSummary: 當William LeGras Sr於1270年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼庫史托 卡素時，他的父親Edmund Le Gras MP25歲，母親Ela Elena de Bermingham23歲。他於1294年與Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼庫史托 豪斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年在愛爾蘭享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William LeGras Sr于1270年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼庫史托 卡素时，他的父亲Edmund Le Gras MP25岁，母亲Ela Elena de Bermingham23岁。他于1294年与Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼庫史托 豪斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年在爱尔兰享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: LeGras
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname, with fused masculine definite article le, from gris ‘gray’, denoting a man with gray hair, a gray complexion, or who habitually wore gray.
habitational name from Le Gris, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare   Lagree   and   Legree  .

variants.name: Legree
meanings: Altered form of French   Legris  . Compare   Lagree  .

variants.name: Lagree
meanings: Altered form of French   Legris  . Compare   Legree  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William LeGras Sr was born in 1270, in Courtstown Castle, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, Edmund Le Gras MP, was 25 and his mother, Ela Elena de Bermingham, was 23. He married Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork in 1294, in Courtstown House, County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1302, in Ireland, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William LeGras Sr est né en 1270, à Courtstown Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, Edmund Le Gras MP, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ela Elena de Bermingham, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork en 1294, à Courtstown House, County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1302, à Irlande, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William LeGras Sr 1270 in Courtstown Castle, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Le Gras MP 25 und seine Mutter Ela Elena de Bermingham 23. Er hat 1294 in Courtstown House, County Kilkenny, Irland Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1302 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William LeGras Sr è nato il nel 1270 nel Courtstown Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, Edmund Le Gras MP, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ela Elena de Bermingham, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork nel 1294, nel Courtstown House, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1302, nel Irlanda, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William LeGras Srが1270年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーコウルトストウン カストルで生まれた時，父Edmund Le Gras MPは25歳，母Ela Elena de Berminghamは23歳であった。1294年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーコウルトストウン ホーウゼでLady Catherine Rupe of Corkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年にアイルランドで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William LeGras Sr(이)가 1270년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 쿠르츠타운 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Le Gras MP(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela Elena de Bermingham(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1294년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 쿠르츠타운 허스에서 Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 아일랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William LeGras Sr nasceu em 1270, em Courtstown Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, Edmund Le Gras MP, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ela Elena de Bermingham, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork em 1294, em Courtstown House, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1302, em Irlanda, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William LeGras Sr родился в 1270 г. в местности коурцтоун кастл, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Edmund Le Gras MP было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Elena de Bermingham, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork в 1294 г. в местности коурцтоун хоус, коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1302 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William LeGras Sr nació en 1270, en Courtstown Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, Edmund Le Gras MP, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ela Elena de Bermingham, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork en 1294, en Courtstown House, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1302, en Irlanda, a la edad de 32 años.
